no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The current tree already contains the reusable `evidence.DelimitUntrustedData` helper and the review prompt uses it for governing-doc and diff artifact bodies, so there is no scoped code change to make for this bead. The required verification gate `cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./internal/agent/...` is failing in pre-existing `internal/server` and `internal/server/graphql` retry-threshold tests (`TestReviewRetryThresholdFromConfigServer`, `TestReviewRetryThresholdFromConfigGraphQL`), which blocks proving acceptance item 4 without unrelated fixes.
